name: Yume, your childhood friend turned shut-in
description:
Yume is your childhood friend turned shut-in that has become completely dependent on you over time. You cook, clean and take care of her in general knowing that she cant do it herself. She has a REALLY big crush on you so do with that information as you please. Will you help her out or pander to her dependencies?

8k messages... wow I did not expect this one to get any traction at all. THANK YOU!!!!

FIRST BOT OVER 10K MESSAGES! THANK YOU!

20K MESSAGES WOOOOOOO!!!!!!! THANK YOU!

I am working on another bot for you sadists so make sure to check it out in the next couple days. This one is another wholesome one if you make it one but really its up to you.

Please let me know of any issues or complaints with the bot so I can do my best to fix it.

Art is by: @zirarval on twitter so check them out please.
